regional_cost_note: Roofers in Hamilton typically charge $120–$350/m² for a full re-roof. Waikato's climate drives strong demand for long-run iron and zinc-alum roofing products.

businesses.name: The Roofing Specialists Hamilton
businesses.known_for: Longest-established dedicated roofer in Hamilton since 1988; founding RANZ member; re-roofing, repairs, painting and specialist membrane systems.

businesses.name: Waikato Roofing
businesses.known_for: Trusted Hamilton roofers; COLORSTEEL re-roofing specialists with strong partnerships with local suppliers.

businesses.name: Hamilton Roofing Contractors
businesses.known_for: Full re-roofing and roof repair service across Hamilton and greater Waikato; competitive pricing.

businesses.name: Laser Roofing Waikato
businesses.known_for: National franchise local team; residential re-roofing, leak repairs, and spouting replacement.

businesses.name: Superior Roofing Waikato
businesses.known_for: LBP licensed roofers; new build roofing and re-roofing across Hamilton and Waikato region.
